headline: Seaport Global Downgrades Entergy to Neutral
summary: Seaport Global  analyst Angie Storozynski   downgrades Entergy (NYSE:ETR) from Buy to Neutral.

raw.headline: Seaport Global Downgrades Entergy to Neutral
raw.summary: Seaport Global  analyst Angie Storozynski   downgrades Entergy (NYSE:ETR) from Buy to Neutral.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $119
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $118 to $119.
